pageDescription: Calculate age in years, months, and days based on birth date with precise calculations including leap years

leapYears.title: Leap Years
leapYears.description: Our calculator accounts for leap years (366 days) in age calculations

precision.title: Calculation Precision
precision.description: Calculations include months with varying days (28, 30, 31 days)

timeZones.title: Time Zones
timeZones.description: Consider time zones when calculating ages across different regions

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides age calculations only
criticalWarningsList.accuracy: Ensure accurate date and time entry for precise results

importantNotesList: Age calculations account for varying month lengths and leap years
Time-based calculations require accurate time zone information
Legal age definitions vary by jurisdiction and purpose
Consider cultural differences in age calculation methods

messages.enterInformation: Enter birth date and calculation date to determine age
messages.resultMessage: Your calculated age is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides age calculations based on standard calendar methods. Results are for general informational purposes and may not meet legal or official documentation requirements.

seekHelp.title: Additional Resources
seekHelp.content: For legal age determinations or official documentation, consult appropriate government agencies or legal professionals in your jurisdiction.
